mapper.insert: INSERT INTO learning_event_log (user_id, problem_id, submit_id, trigger_source, user_intent, action_type, action_id, pedagogical_goal, content_type, strategy, decision_reason, content, request_id, executed, blocked_reason, entry_ref_type, entry_ref_id, path_id, level_id, wrong_item_id, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{problemId}, #{submitId}, #{triggerSource}, #{userIntent}, #{actionType}, #{actionId}, #{pedagogicalGoal}, #{contentType}, #{strategy}, #{decisionReason}, #{content}, #{requestId}, #{executed}, #{blockedReason}, #{entryRefType}, #{entryRefId}, #{pathId}, #{levelId}, #{wrongItemId}, #{createTime})
